headline: XRP Price Prediction: What Happens to XRP If Oil Stays Above $100 and the Fed Doesn’t Cut?
summary: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has had the strongest fundamental setup of any altcoin in 2026—a commodity classification from both the SEC and CFTC, seven ETFs with $1.44 billion in inflows, and major partnerships with Mastercard and Deutsche Bank. But none of the good news has been enough to push the XRP price higher, mainly because geopolitics ... XRP Price Prediction: What Happens to XRP If Oil Stays Above $100 and the Fed Doesn’t Cut?

headline: Small Businesses Can Soon Enjoy New Rewards With the Prime Business and Amazon Business Credit Cards
summary: SEATTLE, March 31, 2026--Amazon (AMZN) today announced a new Prime Business Card and a new Amazon Business Card, coming this spring, offering U.S. customers more ways than ever to save along with a suite of new features designed for small business customers. The cards will be issued by U.S. Bank (USB) as part of the Mastercard (MA) network.

raw.headline: Small Businesses Can Soon Enjoy New Rewards With the Prime Business and Amazon Business Credit Cards
raw.summary: SEATTLE, March 31, 2026--Amazon (AMZN) today announced a new Prime Business Card and a new Amazon Business Card, coming this spring, offering U.S. customers more ways than ever to save along with a suite of new features designed for small business customers. The cards will be issued by U.S. Bank (USB) as part of the Mastercard (MA) network.

headline: U.S. Bank, Mastercard take Amazon's small-business cards from Amex
summary: The Minneapolis-based bank will issue the cards, and Mastercard will act as the network provider. American Express formerly ran the e-commerce giant's business credit card programs.

raw.headline: U.S. Bank, Mastercard take Amazon's small-business cards from Amex

headline: Credit card APRs have an 'economically meaningful' impact on consumer spending, Boston Fed finds
summary: When credit card rates go up, borrowers spend less on plastic, according to a research paper by the Federal Reserve Bank of Boston.

headline: Qover marks 10 years with $12M in growth funding from CIBC
summary: Qover, the European leader in embedded insurance orchestration, marks its 10th anniversary with a significant milestone: the extension of a $12 million growth capital facility from CIBC Innovation Banking – bringing total funding raised since inception to over $100 million – reinforcing investor confidence in the company's trajectory and its AI-driven vision for the next decade of insurance infrastructure.

raw.headline: Qover marks 10 years with $12M in growth funding from CIBC

headline: Australia to end debit and credit card surcharges from October
summary: RBA said removing surcharging would make card payments “simpler, more transparent” and increase competition among providers.
